scripts.build: yarn workspace @tiny-tools/shared build && yarn workspaces foreach -Ap --include 'web' --include 'api' run build
scripts.build:web: yarn workspace @tiny-tools/shared build && yarn workspace web build
scripts.build:api: yarn workspace @tiny-tools/shared build && yarn workspace api build
scripts.clean: yarn workspaces foreach -A exec rm -rf node_modules dist .output .nuxt
